title: Gettysburg: The Tide Turns
summary: Gettysburg: The Tide Turns, An Oral History is a 2025 nonfiction military history book by Bruce Chadwick. It was published by Pegasus.
extract: Gettysburg: The Tide Turns, An Oral History is a 2025 nonfiction military history book by Bruce Chadwick. It was published by Pegasus.
